recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.

recommendations.title: Christmas As Usual
recommendations.overview: To celebrate their engagement, Thea takes Jashan home — but his Indian roots and her family's Norwegian traditions clash in a chaotic Christmas.

recommendations.title: Ek Tha Tiger
recommendations.overview: A top Indian agent is sent to observe the actions of a scientist but the mission complicates when he falls in love with the scientist's Pakistani caretaker.

recommendations.title: Lion
recommendations.overview: A five-year-old Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, thousands of kilometers from home. He survives many challenges before being adopted by a couple in Australia; 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

recommendations.title: Tully
recommendations.overview: Marlo, a mother of three, including a newborn, is gifted a night nanny by her brother. Hesitant at first, she quickly forms a bond with the thoughtful, surprising, and sometimes challenging nanny named Tully.

recommendations.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde
recommendations.overview: A doctor's research into the roots of evil turns him into a hideous depraved fiend.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Ilo Ilo
recommendations.overview: During the late 1990s, a busy working-class Singaporean couple hires a Filipino woman as a maid and nanny to their young son.

recommendations.title: The Mistress of Spices
recommendations.overview: Tilo is an Indian shopkeeper in America with an ability to see the future and a magical connection to powerful spices, which she uses to help her customers satisfy their various needs and desires. One day she falls in love with an American man. But t

recommendations.title: Yao
recommendations.overview: From his village in northern Senegal, Yao is a 13-year-old boy ready to do anything to meet his hero: Seydou Tall, a famous French actor. Invited to Dakar to promote his new book, the latter goes to his country of origin for the first time. To fulfil
